Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class OptionOrderCreate.Builder

    The execution type of this option order.
    OptionOrderCreate.Builder
    priceDirection(PriceDirection priceDirection)
    The direction of the price, which indicates whether the entire option order should result in a credit to the account placing the order, or a debit from the account placing the order.

    A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5.

  • Method Details

    • brokerCapacity

      public OptionOrderCreate.Builder brokerCapacity(OptionOrderCreateBrokerCapacity brokerCapacity)
      The capacity in which the broker is acting for this option order.

    • clientOrderId

      public OptionOrderCreate.Builder clientOrderId(String clientOrderId)
      User-supplied unique option order ID. Cannot be more than 40 characters long.

    • clientReceivedTime

      public OptionOrderCreate.Builder clientReceivedTime(OffsetDateTime clientReceivedTime)
      Required for any client who is having Apex do CAT reporting on their behalf.

    • clientReceivedTime

      public OptionOrderCreate.Builder clientReceivedTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> clientReceivedTime)
      Required for any client who is having Apex do CAT reporting on their behalf.

    • currencyCode

      public OptionOrderCreate.Builder currencyCode(String currencyCode)
      Only "USD" is supported. Full list of currency codes is defined at: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

    • fees

      public OptionOrderCreate.Builder fees(List<FeeCreate> fees)
      Fees that will be applied to this option order.

    • fees

      public OptionOrderCreate.Builder fees(Optional<? extends List<FeeCreate>> fees)
      Fees that will be applied to this option order.

    • legs

      public OptionOrderCreate.Builder legs(List<OptionOrderLegCreate> legs)
      The legs of this option order. Only a single leg is allowed to be specified, and it must be for an OPTION security.

    • limitPrice

      public OptionOrderCreate.Builder limitPrice(DecimalCreate limitPrice)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • orderDate

      public OptionOrderCreate.Builder orderDate(DateCreate orderDate)
      Represents a whole or partial calendar date, such as a birthday. The time of day and time zone are either specified elsewhere or are insignificant. The date is relative to the Gregorian Calendar. This can represent one of the following:

      * A full date, with non-zero year, month, and day values * A month and day value, with a zero year, such as an anniversary * A year on its own, with zero month and day values * A year and month value, with a zero day, such as a credit card expiration date

      Related types are [google.type.TimeOfDay][google.type.TimeOfDay] and `google.protobuf.Timestamp`.

    • orderType

      public OptionOrderCreate.Builder orderType(OptionOrderCreateOrderType orderType)
      The execution type of this option order.

    • priceDirection

      public OptionOrderCreate.Builder priceDirection(PriceDirection priceDirection)
      The direction of the price, which indicates whether the entire option order should result in a credit to the account placing the order, or a debit from the account placing the order.

    • quantity

      public OptionOrderCreate.Builder quantity(DecimalCreate quantity)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • specialReportingInstructions

      public OptionOrderCreate.Builder specialReportingInstructions(List<OptionOrderCreateSpecialReportingInstructions> specialReportingInstructions)
      Special Reporting Instructions to be applied to this option order. Can include multiple Instructions.

    • specialReportingInstructions

      public OptionOrderCreate.Builder specialReportingInstructions(Optional<? extends List<OptionOrderCreateSpecialReportingInstructions>> specialReportingInstructions)
      Special Reporting Instructions to be applied to this option order. Can include multiple Instructions.

    • timeInForce

      public OptionOrderCreate.Builder timeInForce(OptionOrderCreateTimeInForce timeInForce)
      Must be the value "DAY". Regulatory requirements dictate the system captures the intended time_in_force, which is why this a mandatory field.

    • build

      public OptionOrderCreate build()
